items.title: 3 Fabulous Dividend Stocks to Buy in February
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: Three Motley Fool contributors recommend AbbVie, Amgen, and Gilead Sciences as fabulous dividend stocks to buy in February. AbbVie has a strong pipeline and growth drivers, Amgen's prospects remain robust despite a recent setback, and Gilead offers a high dividend yield and stability.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: AbbVie has a strong pipeline, growth drivers, and a high dividend yield, making it a favorable pick for income investors.
Despite a recent setback, Amgen's prospects remain robust, with a deep pipeline, several growth drivers, and a high dividend yield.
Gilead offers a high dividend yield, a stable business, and strong free cash flow, making it an attractive option for income investors.
